summary: The diff implements REQ-1 correctly. A PlaceholderPage component is added with Luminia Group branding, obsidian background, gold accents, and Cormorant Garamond typography. App.tsx is modified to render only PlaceholderPage while all original components (Navigation, HeroSection, ManifestoSection, SubsidiaryGrid, Footer, WelcomePopup) are commented out and preserved for future re-publishing. All acceptance criteria appear to be met.

hallucinated_features.description: A caffeine.ai footer attribution link is added to the PlaceholderPage
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not mention adding any third-party attribution or caffeine.ai branding to the placeholder page.
